question: You do not have a hazardous materials endorsement on your commercial driver license. When can you legally haul hazardous materials?
canonical_answer:
a. Never
b. Only when the shipment does not cross state lines
c. Only when the load is placarded
d. All of the above

A

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: only when the vehicle does not require placards
